name: Landing page renders hero section and CTA button
description: When a user navigates to the Mantiz landing page, the hero section is visible with a headline describing the product, and a Scan a Diff call-to-action button is present.

planSteps.description: The hero section is visible and contains a headline with the words 'AI' and either 'lie detector', 'trust score', or 'fake' describing Mantiz as a tool that scans code diffs for cheating patterns
A 'Scan a Diff' button is visible in the hero area
